hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.tagline: I am a motivated Junior Developer with IT experience from Turkey and a strong passion for software development. I recently completed my apprenticeship and expanded my skills in modern web technologies. Since childhood, I have been fascinated by computers and solving technical problems. Now I look forward to growing professionally and contributing to hands-on projects.

projectDetail.processDescription: Documenting the iterative journey from architectural blueprints to production-ready code.
projectDetail.ctaDescription: I'm currently looking for new challenges where I can apply my expertise. Let's talk about how I can contribute to your team.
